name: Maya Action: Assign Material
description: Creates a Maya action that assigns an existing material (shading group or shader) to one or more target nodes. Provide target node names comma-separated. If a shader is provided instead of a shading group, the node will look up its shading group automatically. Chain via actions_in/actions_out into a Maya Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]

    material = inputs.get('material') or self.get_parameter('material', '')
    target_nodes = inputs.get('target_nodes') or self.get_parameter('target_nodes', '')

    action = {
        'type': 'assign_material',
        'material': material,
        'target_nodes': target_nodes
    }

    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added assign_material action -> {material} to {target_nodes}')

    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
